priceCalculator.title: Build Your Best Website
priceCalculator.professionalDesc: Add features according to your business needs

items.q: How long does website development take?
items.a: For Landing Page, it takes about 2-3 days after we receive complete data.

items.q: Is Hosting and Domain included in the package?
items.a: Yes, our packages include setup for hosting and domain (.com/.id) for the first year.

items.q: What if I don't have content/text?
items.a: Don't worry, our team will help create persuasive copywriting based on your business profile.

items.q: Can the website be opened smoothly on mobile?
items.a: Of course. All websites we build are Responsive, meaning the display automatically adjusts to any device.

items.q: Can you help manage the website after launch?
items.a: Yes. We provide monthly maintenance services if you need help updating content or performance monitoring.
Yes, we guarantee client satisfaction with revisions until the website is ready as agreed.
Payment is 50% DP upfront, and 50% after the website is completed and ready for publication.

items.q: Is there a warranty after the website is completed?
items.a: Yes, we provide a 3-month warranty for bug fixes and minor maintenance after the website goes live.
